svg.aria-label: T0 survey plan — the story-bible zone sheet

g.title: The old breach — dressed stone does not wash away; it walks. The flood came through a hole people made
The otters den in DRESSED stone — squared blocks, in a riverbank

g.text: to the village — half a ri
the old precinct wall — robbed to footings
the house keeps the old ring's corner
the old fields — four times this, let go
the old stables — stalls for twenty

g.title: The rope and the warning — the ruin is not entered, and not discussed
The family plot — and one plot swept and weeded with NO stone in it

circle.title: The round begins and ends at its post by the gate
